use_cases: Adding and managing multiple framework or technology tags for developer profiles
Categorizing content with multiple labels in content management systems
Filtering and searching items by multiple selected tags in dashboards
Collecting skill sets or interests from users in onboarding flows
Adding product categories or attributes in e-commerce inventory systems
ai_summary: A tags input component built with Ark UI that allows users to add, display, and remove multiple tag items in a flexible input field. Features dark mode support, keyboard-accessible delete buttons, and visual focus states with a blue accent ring. The component uses a compound component pattern with Root, Context, Control, Item, Input, and related sub-components for complete state management and customization.
